name: @easytransfer/browser-extension
description: EasyTransfer sender — Chrome/Edge MV3 extension that streams QR codes.

scripts.wasm: wasm-pack build ../../crates/transfer-engine --target web --features wasm,serde && rm -rf wasm-pkg && cp -r ../../crates/transfer-engine/pkg wasm-pkg

manifest.name: 易传 - 离线文件传输
manifest.description: 通过屏幕二维码视频流，完全离线传输文件到手机。无需网络、蓝牙、USB。
